latin: Harrius petitor factus est in turma Quidditch Gryffindorensium — discipulus primi anni iam diu non electus erat. in primo certamine contra Slytherinos, scoparum manubrium eius subito incantatum est et eum excutere conabatur. Hermione vidit Professorem Snape Harrium oculis fixis intuentem et verba murmurantem. ad eum per gradus se insinuavit et pallium eius igne magico incendit. scoparum manubrium statim conquievit. Harrius pilam auream cepit et Gryffindor vicit.

questions.prompt: What position did Harry play in Quidditch?
What went wrong during Harry's first match?
choices: He was hit by a Bludger

questions.prompt: What did Hermione do to help Harry?
questions.target: She set Snape's cloak on fire
choices: She cast a shield spell on Harry
She set Snape's cloak on fire
She caught the Snitch for him

questions.target: Harry caught the golden Snitch and Gryffindor won
choices: Harry caught the golden Snitch and Gryffindor won
The game ended in a draw

translation: Harry became a Seeker on the Gryffindor Quidditch team — a first-year student had not been chosen for a long time. In the first match against the Slytherins, his broomstick was suddenly bewitched and was trying to throw him off. Hermione saw Professor Snape staring at Harry with fixed eyes and muttering words. She crept toward him through the rows of seats and set his cloak on fire with magical fire. The broomstick immediately calmed down. Harry caught the golden ball and Gryffindor won.
